content.query:
CREATE VIEW                                                     v_ManufacturedOrders
-- drop view v_ManufacturedOrders
as
SELECT 'Manufacturing Order' as									[Order Type]
,		MWH.MFNO as												[Manufacturing Order Number]
,		MWH.WHHS as												[Manufacturing Order Status]
,      	MWH.ITNO AS 											[Item Number]
,		MWH.STDT AS												[Estimated Start Date]
,       cast(cast(NULLIF(MWH.RSDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date) AS                                             [Actual Start Date]
,       MWH.FIDT AS                                             [Estimated Finish Date]
,       cast(cast(NULLIF(MWH.REFD,0) as varchar(10)) as date) AS                                             [Actual Finish Date]
,		MWH.ORQA AS												[Order Qty]
,		MWH.RVQA AS												[Received Qty]
,       MWH.ORQA - MWH.RVQA AS                                  [Open Qty]
,		cast(CAST(NULLIF(MWH.RPDT, 0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Last Received Date]
,		MF.APPR  AS												[Price]
,		MWH.ORQA*MF.APPR AS										[Total Amount]
,		MWH.RESP as												[Responsible]
,		MWH.WHLO as												[Warehouse]
FROM            M3.MWOHED AS MWH
LEFT JOIN 		M3.MITFAC MF on MWH.ITNO = MF.ITNO
WHERE	MWH.WHHS > 10
